tabDescriptions.general: Manage shared application behavior and default runtime settings.
tabDescriptions.appearance: Adjust workspace themes, primary colors, and custom presets.
tabDescriptions.resources: Manage Chromium and GEO resource download, installation, and activation.
tabDescriptions.ai: Manage AI configs, chat defaults, and tool permission policies.
tabDescriptions.recycle-bin: Restore or permanently delete archived environments, proxies, and groups.
tabDescriptions.dev: Configure the Chromium path used during local development and debugging.

dev.title: Developer Configuration
dev.chromiumExecutableDesc: Override the Chromium executable used during development. Takes effect only in tauri dev mode.
dev.notAFile: Path is not a valid file

general.title: General Settings
general.chromiumLoggingDesc: Enable Chromium stderr logging. Disable to reduce resource usage. Takes effect for newly launched environments.
general.defaultStartupUrlDesc: Used when an environment has no startup URL configured. Leave blank to open a new tab.
general.defaultStartupUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://

theme.title: Theme Customization
theme.noCustomPresets: No custom presets yet. Save a color you use often.

ai.title: AI Model Configuration
ai.empty: No AI configs. Click 'Add' to create first.

aiChatGlobalPrompt.title: AI Chat Global Prompt
aiChatGlobalPrompt.desc: This system prompt is prepended to all AI Chat conversations.
aiChatGlobalPrompt.placeholder: Enter a global system prompt for all AI chats...

captcha.title: CAPTCHA Solver Service
captcha.empty: No solver configs. Click 'Add' to create.
captcha.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this solver config? This action cannot be undone.

resource.resourceDesc: Resource download, installation, and activation are handled in Settings page.
resource.geoDbDesc: Used for proxy exit profiling, auto language/timezone suggestions, and environment geolocation linkage.
resource.redownloadConfirmDesc: Chromium {{version}} will be fetched from the cloud and replace the local install. Close any running profiles using this version first.

maintenance.title: Advanced Maintenance
maintenance.recycleBinDesc: Restore or permanently delete archived data

aiDialog.deleteDesc: Delete '{{name}}'? This action cannot be undone.

variables.title: Script Variables
variables.desc: Define expected variable names and default values. Pre-filled to initial variables at runtime. Use {{variable}} syntax in steps.

toolPermissions.title: AI Tool Permissions
toolPermissions.desc: Manage confirmation requirements for dangerous operations
